perspectives.name: Contrarian
perspectives.question: Is this a crowded trade?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Target MSA allocations concentrated in top-5 consensus markets (Dallas, Phoenix, Atlanta, Charlotte, Tampa) with >60% allocation AND rent growth assumptions exceed 5-year CAGR by >100bps

perspectives.name: Cycle Timer
perspectives.question: Are we deploying at the wrong point in the cycle?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Strategy type is value-add or opportunistic AND dominant cycle position is hyper-supply or late-expansion AND entry cap rates are below 25th percentile of 10-year distribution

perspectives.name: Execution Risk
perspectives.question: Can this strategy actually be executed?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Pipeline coverage ratio below 3x AND broker coverage below 80% of target MSAs AND deployment target requires more than 5 closings per quarter

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs. Cycle Timer perspective carries veto weight on ACTIVE verdicts when cycle position is hyper-supply or recession. Contrarian perspective escalates to mandatory review when crowded-trade dynamics are identified in >50% of target allocation.
